tutorials.title: Movement
tutorials.body: Use WASD or the left stick to move. Hold SHIFT to walk quietly.

tutorials.title: Interaction
tutorials.body: Walk up to an interactable and press E (or A on gamepad) to use it.

tutorials.title: Inventory
tutorials.body: Press I (or TAB on gamepad) to open your inventory. Drag to move items.

tutorials.title: Saving
tutorials.body: Progress auto-saves every checkpoint. Press F5 to save manually.

tutorials.title: Travel
tutorials.body: When the lifeboat's propulsion is online, you can travel to other derelicts in the Synaptic Sea.

tutorials.title: Objectives
tutorials.body: Each derelict carries a sequence of objectives. The current objective shows in the top-left.

tutorials.title: Fire Hazard
tutorials.body: Fire spreads between adjacent rooms. Find an extinguisher or vent it into space.

tutorials.title: Low Oxygen
tutorials.body: Your suit is leaking oxygen. Find a refill station or return to the lifeboat.

tutorials.title: Save Failed
tutorials.body: Could not save the ship. Resolve the issue before leaving — your progress was NOT saved.
